note: HAND-AUTHORED ground truth for the stall-precision/recall harness. A human read ledger-30d.jsonl + seeded-goals.json and listed, per goal, the GENUINE progress days (integer day index N from the first ledger row at base_iso). This is deliberately NOT produced by goals.ledger_artifacts / pr_artifacts / _matches / last_progress_at — those are the code UNDER TEST. The oracle derives truly-stalled days from these genuine days via the mechanical stall definition (now - lastGenuineProgress > stallAfterHours), so an over-matching linker (that treats noise as progress) or an under-matching one (that stops matching merged PRs) DIVERGES from this ground truth and drops recall or precision below its gate.
derivation: goal-1's real artifacts: a dispatch in elitecoder/assistant (day 0), the merge of PR #101 in that repo (day 5), a dispatch in assistant (day 10); nothing after. goal-2's real artifacts: td-500 dispatches on days 0,2,4,6,8,10,12 then a 10-day gap then 22,24,26,28. All other ledger rows are noise (some/other-repo, unrelated PR #999) and are NOT progress for either goal.
